name: Community Café
description: Our relaxed weekend open thread — life updates, pets, games, food, creative projects, AI chaos, weekend plans, and general conversation. A regular weekend tradition that pauses (or gets gloriously replaced) whenever a bigger Rainbow Circuits event takes over the weekend.
schedule: Most weekends — pauses during special event weekends
participationIdeas: A life update, big or tiny
A comment on someone else's weekend
